creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
The breakage depends on ports option EXAMPLES enabled, otherwise the port builds fine.


I found two other cases, which seems to be related to this error[1][2]. The first belongs to macosx, the second is from freebsd-pkg-fallout with HEAD i386.

[1] https://github.com/google/libkml/issues/14
[2] https://www.mail-archive.com/freebsd-pkg-fallout@freebsd.org/msg648220.html
